paragraph: May 2025 | Illustration of my character Charlie from Heartlines. Explores pure black as a comic book-style shadow color. | Programs: Procreate
February 2026 | Process page of the first character design for deepwinter vein. Bio-modified warrior class protagonist who vomits lava to fill their lava blaster’s ammo. | Programs: Procreate
September 2024 | Poster illustration for Heartlines. Uses a comic book-style to depict Aempyriel in their guardian angel getup looking after Sam Diaz. | Programs: Procreate
December 2025 | Trailer for my game So Long, Long Time. Explores grief with a visual emphasis on a melancholy atmosphere. Solo project. | Programs: Unreal, Maya, Procreate, Mixamo
November 2024 | Illustrated portrait of Aempyriel from Heartlines. Their praying hands alludes to their divine nature, while their war uniform hints at their life as Lee. | Programs: Procreate
November 2024 | Illustrated portrait of Sam from Heartlines. Builds up from black shadows into color. | Programs: Procreate
February 2026 | Second character design created for deepwinter vein. She is a sassy higher class member of society, meant to contrast the grim warrior protagonist. | Programs: Procreate
September 2024 | Character design lineup of all main characters in the Heartlines universe. Fashion, in line with the world's lore, is meant to span across time periods. | Programs: Procreate
May 2025 | Turntable showcasing my first 3d character design. Her design is loosely based on the textures and silhouette of a crab. | Programs: Maya, ZBrush, Substance Painter, Procreate, Mixamo
October 2025 | Turntable showcasing the high-res player character from So Long, Long Time. The giant cavern in their chest symbolizes their grief. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Mixamo, Marmoset
November 2025 | Enemy for my game So Long, Long Time. Meant be the horrific manifestation of sorrow and grief. | Programs: Maya, Procreate

March 2026 | Giant underwater evil creature concept art for deepwinter vein. This design is loosely based on the idea of someone who has been left to rot underwater for a very long time, decaying and merging with the sea around her. | Programs: Procreate
March 2026 | Weapons concept art for the deepwinter vein warrior class, powered by their lava-vomit. | Programs: Procreate
February 2025 | Jean ("Through Our Eyes") turntable, standing confidently in her room. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Mixamo, Marmoset
May 2024 | In-game character dialogue sprite for my character Willow from melody lain. She's nervous to talk to the voices she's hearing. | Programs: Procreate
May 2024 | In-game character dialogue sprite for my character Oliver from melody lain. He laughs maliciously, changed for the worse now that he's a ghost. | Programs: Procreate

February 2025 | Character design for Jean from Through Our Eyes. She is a alternative masc lesbian with an attitude. I used feedback from my fellow studio members to ditch the sportiness and settle on an edgier design. | Programs: Procreate

May 2025 | Art demo reel for our VR game Through Our Eyes, where I was the sole artist. The reel showcases three rooms and two characters I modeled, textured, and rigged. The bedrooms correlate to the personalities of their respective characters, while the record shop acts as a common ground across the two different people. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Substance Painter, Unreal

video: images/videos/3d render _ Final Diorama - Zoom In.mp4
paragraph: May 2025 | Detailed zoom render for 3D diorama meant to suit my 3D military crab character. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Substance Painter

December 2025 | So Long, Long Time, a visuals-driven 3D solo game built in 3 months. Most of the focus was placed on investigation into my own feelings following the loss of my brother. | Programs: Unreal, Maya, Procreate, Mixamo

November 2025 | A web app I created for a Women's Gender Studies class final. The site prompts users to share their queer experiences, an idea inspired by The Unsent Project. I taught myself Firebase to store the user-submitted notes. | Programs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Firebase
October 2025 | UI artwork for the player HUD depicting health, ammo, and states. Strong lineart and shadows align with the dark theming of So Long, Long Time. | Programs: Procreate
May 2025 | Props created for a military nomad-themed 3D diorama. | Programs: Maya, Procreate
April 2025 | Military nomad-themed 3D diorama process page, showing various final renders and references. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Substance Painter

May 2025 | Wireframe turntable showing the military crab 3d character design mesh. Modeled from low-poly to sculpted detail to retopology. | Programs: Maya, ZBrush, Substance Painter, Procreate, Mixamo

January 2025 | Design process for a future 3D character. Light worldbuilding before finalizing the character, then reference gathering and sketching. Loved the crab textures and want to utilize for clothing and such. | Programs: Procreate
May 2025 | Still detail renders of my military crab 3d character design. Sketchfab here. | Programs: Maya, ZBrush, Substance Painter, Procreate, Mixamo

May 2025 | Through Our Eyes is a VR experience exploring the diversity inherent in the human condition as players experience a day in the life of friends from wildly different backgrounds, aided by eye tracking and other methods of interaction in the VR space. I was the sole artist on our team of four people. | Programs: Maya, Procreate, Substance Painter, Unreal
February 2025 | Vegetation prop. First time exploring transparent meshes. Included in the military nomad-themed diorama. | Programs: Maya, ZBrush, Procreate
February 2025 | Character turntable for Gert from Through Our Eyes, posed in her bedroom. | Programs: Procreate, Maya, Mixamo, Marmoset

February 2025 | Character design for Gert from Through Our Eyes. She is a whimsical and shy slightly-closeted trans-woman. I used feedback from my fellow studio members to settle on a final design. | Programs: Procreate
February 2025 | Container prop. Emphasis on storytelling with signs of wear and tear. | Programs: Maya, Procreate
December 2024 | In-game sprite walk cycles for the main characters of the Heartlines 2D Demo. | Programs: Procreate
December 2024 | Heartlines: Heaven Beside You (Limerick Demo) was made in about three and half weeks, meant to focus on storytelling and narrative design. Solo project. | Programs: Procreate, Godot

November 2025 | Turntable showcasing Aempyriel's handgun (Heartlines). The design builds on themes of time collapsing in on itself by combining elements of an old revolver and 1911 Colt, also adding angelic motifs. Low poly, sculpted detail in displacement map, then texturing. | Programs: Maya, ZBrush, Substance Painter, Marmoset
November 2025 | Turntable showing my first attempt at a low-poly character model (Aempyriel, Heartlines). | Programs: Maya, Procreate
November 2025 | In-progress renders, textures, and concepting for the Ashley character model turntable. | Programs: Maya, Procreate
September 2024 | Guardian angel concept for Heartlines. Focused on blending military uniform/weapon components from across multiple eras and combining those with angelic motifs. | Programs: Procreate

May 2024 | Melody Lain is a platformer and visual novel mix that follows Willow as she ventures through a familiar old mansion, recovering memories she’s not sure if she should forget. Solo project crafted in about a month. | Programs: Unreal, Maya, Procreate

May 2024 | A short interactive narrative about Gavin's cold, no-good Saturday night. The goal was to use HTML, CSS, and Javascript to explore single-page applications, APIs, and other core principles of JS. | Programs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
April 2024 | 3D model of my dorm room using image file textures from pictures I took of my stuff. First foray into a larger-scale 3D project. | Programs: Maya
March 2024 | A simple web design project practicingHTML, CSS, and JavaScript. First time using CSV file to store data. | Programs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
January 2024 | End of a cutscene animation made for a Game Jam game (Welcome to Schmeldon), meant to be humorous. | Programs: Procreate
January 2024 | Walk cycle animations for the main player character of Welcome to Schmeldon, a Game Jam project. | Programs: Procreate
January 2024 | Created for 2024 Global Game Jam, Make Me Laugh. I worked as the 2D artist on this game as a part of my first team-made game in college. | Programs: Procreate, Unreal

December 2023 | The first full game I made in college. In Purrpetuity is a single-player puzzle RPG following Luna, the protagonist, as she revisits her childhood home to save her three cats, who send her into a nostalgic spiral of soul-searching and introspection. Solo project. | Programs: RPG Maker 2003, Procreate, Gimp
November 2023 | Animated logo design for an existing company, based on their website's fantastical narrative content and values. | Programs: Adobe Illustrator, Procreate
November 2023 | 8-bit character sprite sheets for my cat-themed RPG Maker 2003 Game. | Programs: Procreate, Gimp
September 2023 | Promotional art for my board game, depicting Elysia at the end of the game. | Programs: Procreate
March 2023 | AP 2D Art & Design piece exploring mortality. Built up from many thumbnail sketches to a full piece.| Programs: Procreate

December 2022 | AP 2D Art & Design piece exploring the existential quandary of time. Built up from many references and thumbnail sketches to a full piece. Grisaille to color gradient map. | Programs: Procreate
October 2022 | Exploratory character design for a clown character. Expanded upon from a gijinkas I created for a pre-college course. | Programs: Procreate
October 2022 | AP 2D Art & Design piece exploring the concept of the relationship between people and a God. Grisaille to color. | Programs: Procreate
September 2022 | AP 2D Art & Design painting exploring how humans view death. | Medium: Oil on canvas
July 2022 | Character design sketches for a potential game character, taking place in a post-apocalyptic military world. | Programs: Procreate
March 2022 | Character sketches of my D&D rogue character Dazey. | Programs: Procreate
